sentences.text: Yo {como/bebo/compro} una manzana todos los días.
sentences.translation: I eat an apple every day.
She drinks water.
He is a student.
The book is very good.
I have a cat.
The teacher explains the grammar to us.
I like learning Spanish.
He works eight hours a day.
I bought a new book.
She laughed happily.

sentences.text: Aunque hacía frío, él {salió/entró/volvió} a correr de todas formas.
sentences.translation: Although it was cold, he still went out for a run.
He prepared carefully for the exam.
The restaurant in the city centre is very popular.

sentences.text: Yo ya {he/había/voy a} {visitado/conocido/pasado} la Gran Muralla.
sentences.translation: I have already visited the Great Wall.
She recommends that we drink more water.

sentences.text: Con el {desarrollo/declive/estancamiento} de la tecnología, la vida se vuelve cada vez más {cómoda/difícil/cara}.
sentences.translation: With the development of technology, life becomes ever more comfortable.
His speech attracted the attention of everyone.
This issue deserves serious reflection.

sentences.text: Ella {entrenó/abandonó/interrumpió} durante años y {finalmente/sin embargo/nunca} {ganó/perdió/alcanzó} el campeonato.
sentences.translation: She trained for years and finally won the championship.
Economic globalisation brings both opportunities and risks.

sentences.text: Esta {política/teoría/investigación} ha tenido {importantes/escasas/nulas} repercusiones en la {reducción/aumento/ignorancia} de la pobreza.
sentences.translation: This policy has had important repercussions on the reduction of poverty.
His theory has profoundly questioned the established understanding.

sentences.text: La novela {ilumina/oculta/simplifica} la {complejidad/superficialidad/monotonía} de la naturaleza humana de manera {profunda/efímera/banal}.
sentences.translation: The novel illuminates the complexity of human nature in a profound way.
Faced with challenges, he demonstrated notable strength.

sentences.text: En la era de la {sobreinformación/estancamiento/aislamiento}, el pensamiento {crítico/pasivo/emocional} resulta {imprescindible/superfluo/dañino}.
sentences.translation: In the age of information overload, critical thinking is indispensable.

sentences.text: El {debate/estudio/análisis} toca {profundas/superficiales/abstractas} contradicciones de orden {ético/estético/meramente formal}.
sentences.translation: The debate touches on deep contradictions of an ethical order.

sentences.text: La {política/teoría/práctica} ha revelado numerosas {debilidades/ventajas/posibilidades} durante su {implementación/planificación/evaluación}.
sentences.translation: The policy revealed numerous weaknesses during its implementation.

sentences.text: El lenguaje no es solo un instrumento de {comunicación/división/competencia}, sino también un {vehículo/espejo/obstáculo} del {pensamiento/sentimiento/cuerpo}.
sentences.translation: Language is not only an instrument of communication, but also a vehicle of thought.

sentences.text: Sus {obras/declaraciones/acciones} desencadenaron un {amplio/breve/parcial} {debate/consenso/silencio} en {ámbitos académicos/círculos políticos/medios populares}.
sentences.translation: His works unleashed a wide-ranging debate in academic circles.

sentences.text: La {expansión/concentración/transferencia} del {capital/poder/conocimiento} suele producirse a expensas del {bien común/interés individual/mercado}.
sentences.translation: The expansion of capital tends to occur at the expense of the common good.
